title: mentha × kuemmerlei
intro: Mentha × kuemmerlei, also known as Bergamot mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a cross between Peppermint and Spearmint. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Bergamot mint include relief from nausea, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as improved digestion and respiratory health. Bergamot mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
